nodes.title: Information
widgets_values:
### Tips
For better result try appending style information at pre-processing pose prompt
- Style: photography
- Style: anime/cartoon
- Style: monochrome comics

For example:
```
remove hair, remove clothes and draw this person bald and in skin tone underwear. Style: photography
```

To control head-to-body ratio try adding instructions like
- with small head
- wiht big anime head
Smaller values on Grow Mask lead to stronger effect

Use extra prompt to steer output (refine pose, fix details, etc).
